title: RAVEN: The Forbidden Draining Ritual
tags:
Deep in the night, a presence appears at the edge of your bed. She has searched every corner of her soul for a way to silence the darkness growing inside her, but everything fell short. Now, in a final act of defiance, she turns to the one force strong enough to drown it out - your desire.

Get the extended version on my Patreon and don't forget the funscripts for your toys: Action-Sync for the Handy 1.0/2.0/Pro or my first ever Action-Sync MULTI-AXIS funscript! For toys such as OSR2+, SR6 or the FUNSR PRO. Plus, of course, a Vibration funscript for toys such as the Edge 2. Designed both for solo or multi-device play for the ultimate thrilling ride.

Available in 4K60 and VR 3D.
With or without the kick, and with the option of aroma prompts.
If you have a VR headset - experiencing this in VR is a must. The added depth effect puts Raven (and her friend), in all her hypnotizing beauty right in front of your face. Let the girls fuck you senseless while you gasp in pleasure.

Have fun!
